creator: lth@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Judging from the patch, this PR is not about my pkg-plist error 
(which pav fixed, thanks pav!), but only about dependencies, which 
which I disagree. The PathTools dependency is valid, so I won't 
remove that, and the Test::Simple dependency is test-only, which 
we don't normally include (yet).
